DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF- TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF- TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUMANA, ANDREW $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.94, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
